notes: CSA publishes research artifacts including whitepapers, control frameworks, survey reports, guides, and other security-related documents. Artifacts are available at cloudsecurityalliance.org/artifacts/ with a URL-safe slug as the identifier.

match_nodes.description: CSA website artifacts — research publications, whitepapers, control frameworks, survey reports, guides, and other security documents.

data.description: Downloadable publications from the Cloud Security Alliance website. Each artifact is identified by a URL slug.
data.notes: Artifact info pages are publicly accessible. Downloads may require a free CSA account. Artifacts include whitepapers, control frameworks, survey reports, prep kits, charters, glossaries, and other document types.

children.description: Artifact slug — URL-safe identifier used in CSA website paths. Pattern allows optional leading dash to accommodate one known malformed slug.
